params.name: Prototype Resolver
params.description: A marvelous machine discovered in the Microcosm, seemingly a prototype for a resolver. Due to design flaws, it doesn't have the functionality to convert other substances into cultivation fluid and serum. Instead, it serves well as a bedside or corner decoration, functioning as a night light.
